creator: mel.xyzzy@rachie.is-a-geek.net
text:
Same problem here.

6.3/amd64 is now downloading, will try to get a verbose boot.

This post suggests it's in the acpi.
http://anothersysadmin.wordpress.com/2007/11/15/problems-with-sata-disks-and-dell-pe-sc1435-how-to-fix/

If anyone's working on this, please let me know, what information you want 
from 6.3, since writing to disk doesn't work for 7.0.

If necessary, I can upgrade in place to 7.x, but if the driver isn't working, 
then hmm. I haven't looked at the disk config and such yet, but maybe I can 
get a dual boot going to test any patches.
-- 
Mel
